title: Indefication of sound
wikitext:
[]: Indefication of sound             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Mar 27, 2022 4:33 am Hello, i'm searching anime ringstones and 1st sound is Asuka's popular line (Anta Baka) but her voice sounds different, i don't remenber from which episode comes, maybe you can tell me. https://youtu.be/e7WsTUpaNIE

[]: Re: Indefication of sound             Quote Post by nerv bae » Fri Apr 01, 2022 8:37 am I don't think that's a Rebuild anta baka. Maybe a TV anta baka?

[]: Re: Indefication of sound             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Jun 03, 2022 4:32 pm Got actually curious and Youtube came to our rescue, because a compilation of all of NGE's "anta baka" was bound to exist... And it's none of them... Maybe a video game one?

[]: Re: Indefication of sound             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Aug 25, 2022 8:03 pm The compression on it makes it sound like it could come from either the audio drama After the End, or more likely, one of the video games. I haven't played much outside of Battle Orchestra Portable and 3nd Impact [which is the best EVA game don't @ me], but if I had to guess, it might be one of the Saturn games, or MAYBE the N64 or one of the PS2 games. But that heavy compression tells me Saturn. There's a lot of recorded voice lines in 1st Impression [Sometimes just called Neon Genesis Evangelion], so maybe check out a playthrough of that?
